engine.py: BacktestResult 含 ic_mean, ic_ir, ic_series, quantile_spread, monthly_ic_heatmap, max_drawdown_recovery_time, rolling_sharpe, turnover_attribution; compute_ic_decay(lags); _compute_quantile_spread(n_quantiles); compute_monthly_ic_heatmap(ic_series)

roadmap.json: 20篇文献, 5策略, 10指标
T01: engine.py monthly_ic_heatmap (year×month DataFrame from ic_series)
T02: templates.py template_sentiment_conditional (turnover proxy, high=rev/low=mom, source: springer 40854-025-00774)
T03: validators.py factor_decay_halflife (IC half-life with interpolation, source: AlphaAgent arxiv 2502.16789)
T04: engine.py max_drawdown_recovery_time (trough→new high days)
T05: templates.py template_ensemble (multi-factor equal-weight blend, source: arxiv 2507.07107)
T06: templates.py template_multi_timeframe (multi-window momentum fusion, source: arxiv 2410.14841)
T07: engine.py turnover_attribution (rebalance + price_drift decomposition)
T08: financial_fields.py operating_cashflow_ttm + operating_cashflow_to_revenue
T09: operators.py ts_skew + ts_kurt (rolling skewness/kurtosis)
T10: validators.py walk_forward_validation_split (temporal train/val/test split)
T11: providers.py cache_ttl + clear_cache + invalidate(category/symbol/field)
T12: engine.py rolling_sharpe (12-month rolling annualized Sharpe)
